steps.title: Set up the inequality test
steps.content: Need every $(x,y)$ in the table to satisfy $y>7x-4$.

steps.title: Test each table
steps.content: Compute $7x-4$: at $x=3$ bound is $17$, at $x=5$ bound is $31$, at $x=8$ bound is $52$. Choice D has $y=21,35,56$, all strictly greater. Others fail at least one row.

steps.title: Identify the table
steps.content: Only choice D satisfies $y>7x-4$ for every row. That matches choice D — D is correct.
